text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One evening before a race, I find Taiki Shuttle
running on the track.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: The gates are open. Three, two, one...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: On your mark, get set...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes off running on her own signal, giving no
indication that she heard me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki runs in fits and starts, with some
deliberating in between. She does this several
times with intense concentration.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I take a seat and observe her for a while.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Phew... Time's up already? Darn it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh? Well, look who it is! Howdy, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Were ya watchin' me just now? Why didn't ya say
anything?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my bad! It was supposed to be a light run, but
I got carried away!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Running is just so fun, it's hard to stop! Wanna
join me for a bit?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Workin' up a good sweat is a surefire way to
revitalize yourself! And food always tastes better
afterward too!
choice_data_list: It's about time to head back.
It's about time to head back.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'm not gonna get in trouble if you're with me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Nobody's around this late, so it's the perfect time
to cut loose!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Please, Trainer? I wanna keep goin'.
choice_data_list: But you need to rest for the race ahead...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: That race is why I gotta run.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
This is a winner's outfit. It represents my grit and
gumption to win.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
When I wear it, my heart and body get the
shakes, and I wanna shout for everybody to
hear...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: "I ain't gonna lose—no way, no how!"

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. It's 'cause you've gone and toughened me
up, Trainer. Now I'm gettin' greedy for victory!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I can't lose now! You gotta take responsibility for
this feeling!
choice_data_list: Okay, we can stay for a little bit.
I'll make sure you win, so don't worry!
I'll make sure you win, so don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I can't lose now! You gotta take responsibility for
this feeling!
choice_data_list: Okay, we can stay for a little bit.
I'll make sure you win, so don't worry!
I'll make sure you win, so don't worry!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, really?! Yahoo!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's already so dark out... but that's not gonna
stop me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sounds like a promise! Thank ya, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hm... How 'bout I make a promise of my own?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I promise I'll always win. I won't lose, no matter
who I'm up against.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep rackin' up victories till I make it to the
top! So let's make sure we're locked and loaded,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taiki Shuttle and I vow to reach the top together.
